message:
fix(interactive): sequence window-size refresh before pending startup work

Wrap the initial window-size command and any queued pending command in a
bubbletea::sequence() so the terminal dimensions are guaranteed to be
resolved before startup work (e.g. RunPending) begins executing. Previously
both were batched in parallel via batch(), which meant pending work could
race ahead of the window-size measurement, causing layout calculations
to use stale or zero dimensions.

- Extract startup_init_cmd() to encapsulate the sequencing logic
- Use sequence([window_size_cmd, pending_cmd]) instead of batch()
- Wrap the sequence itself in batch() with the input_cmd so keyboard
  input setup still runs concurrently
- Add test verifying the sequence order: WindowSizeMsg first, then
  RunPending

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
